query:
SELECT 
  g.id as game_id,
  g.awayTeam as away_team,
  g.homeTeam as home_team,
  g.gameTime,
  g.sport,
  l.awayPitcherName,
  l.awayPitcherMlbamId,
  l.awayPitcherConfirmed,
  l.homePitcherName,
  l.homePitcherMlbamId,
  l.homePitcherConfirmed,
  l.awayLineupConfirmed,
  l.homeLineupConfirmed,
  l.awayLineup,
  l.homeLineup
FROM games g
LEFT JOIN mlb_lineups l ON l.gameId = g.id
WHERE g.sport = 'MLB' AND DATE(g.gameTime) = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY g.gameTime ASC;
